login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your team workspace

join.title: Almost there, {username}
join.subtitle: This workspace is invite-only. Enter the invite code you received from the team staff (coach, manager, or IGL).
join.errorInvalidCode: That does not look like an invite code.
join.errorFailed: Could not redeem the invite. Please try again.
join.errorUsed: This invite code is invalid, already used, or expired.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Sign up with your email — joining the team itself still takes an invite from the staff.
register.success: Check your inbox to confirm your email, then sign in.
register.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.errorFailed: Could not create the account. Please try again.

dashboard.tagline: Everything your team is working on, in one place.
dashboard.theoryEmpty: No theory sessions scheduled — add one in the calendar.
dashboard.matchesEmpty: No scrims or matches scheduled yet.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.hint: Drag to create, click to edit.
calendar.clearTitle: {range, select, week {Clear this week?} month {Clear this month?} other {Clear this view?}}
calendar.clearDescription: This permanently removes {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} from the current view. Recurring events only lose the occurrences shown here — future weeks stay scheduled. This cannot be undone.
calendar.clearConfirm: Delete {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}
calendar.chillMakeDescription: The whole day turns green and the header gets a chill day tag.
calendar.chillRemoveDescription: Back to the grind — the green goes away.
calendar.hintReadOnly: Click an event to view its details. The schedule is managed by staff.

team.title: Team
team.removeDescription: They lose access to everything until they redeem a new invite. Their account is not deleted.
team.noInvites: No invites yet — create one to bring a teammate in.
team.editSubtitle: Nickname, name, and in-game role shown on the roster cards.

eventDialog.newDescription: Add a theory session, scrim, match, meeting, or reminder.
eventDialog.editDescription: Update, or delete, this calendar entry.
eventDialog.midnightHint: An end time earlier than the start means the event runs past midnight.

validation.sameTime: Start and end cannot be the same time.

eventDialog.viewDescription: Viewing only — the schedule is managed by staff.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: How you appear on the roster and around the app.
profile.avatarHint: PNG, JPEG, or WebP, up to 2 MB.
